The '''purbole''' was a [[Primate/Legends|simian]] creature native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

==Biology and appearance==
Purboles were small, smelly, clever and hostile simian animals that lived on the planet Dathomir. They lived and hunted in packs around the [[Tree/Legends|tree]] tops of their home world. They would often hunt their prey from the trees, tracking them before dropping down to surround them.<ref name="GatORW" /> In contrast, [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] used their long arms to swing among the tree tops and hunt Purboles.<ref name="Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref> However, the primates were smart and agile, allowing them to easily escape their predators.<ref name="GatORW" /> Their species consisted of [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]], [[Scout/Legends|scouts]], stalkers, and elders.<ref name="SWG" />

They might be related in some respect to the similar looking [[Ro-roo/Legends|ro-roos]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a herd of purboles inhabited and guarded the wreckage of the crashed [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]] ''[[Tzarina]]''.<ref name="SWG:CS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Crashed Ship|Dathomir}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Purboles were creatures in the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The concept art annotation shown in ''[[From Pencil to Pixel: The Art of Star Wars Galaxies]]'' initially identified the purbole simply as "monkey sloth."<ref name="Pencil">''[[From Pencil to Pixel: The Art of Star Wars Galaxies]]''</ref>
